code: import axios from'axios';const api=axios.create({baseURL:'https://esat-backend-drwm.onrender.com/api',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});api.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('esat_token');if(token)config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);return config;});api.interceptors.response.use(res=>res,err=>{var _err$response;if(((_err$response=err.response)===null||_err$response===void 0?void 0:_err$response.status)===401){localStorage.removeItem('esat_token');localStorage.removeItem('esat_user');window.location.href='/login';}return Promise.reject(err);});export default api;
